output.description: Write output to the specified file instead of stdout

silent.description: Suppress progress meter and error messages

insecure.description: Allow connections to TLS sites without certificate validation

fail_with_body.description: Return error exit code on HTTP errors but still output the response body

retry.description: Retry the request N times on transient errors

method.description: Specify the HTTP method to use (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.)
